body:
This only bumps the compats. It does not modify any Manifests. This should allow the nightly amip to run.

Nightly AMIP successful initialization [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-coarse-nightly-amip/builds/471)

I didn't update any Manifests, so this shouldn't change anything other than the nightly runs.


## To-do
- possibly update manifests?

title: Bump Thermodynamics compat; Bump ClimaEarth project compats
